title: fimbristylis quadriflora
intro: Fimbristylis quadriflora, also known as four-flowered hair grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Fimbristylis quadriflora include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Fimbristylis quadriflora can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
